code: import axios from'axios';const api=axios.create({baseURL:'/api'});export const stopsApi={getAll:()=>api.get('/stops'),getById:id=>api.get(`/stops/${id}`),create:data=>api.post('/stops',data),update:(id,data)=>api.put(`/stops/${id}`,data),delete:id=>api.delete(`/stops/${id}`),uploadImages:(id,files)=>{const form=new FormData();files.forEach(f=>form.append('images',f));return api.post(`/stops/${id}/images`,form,{headers:{'Content-Type':'multipart/form-data'}});},deleteImage:(stopId,imageId)=>api.delete(`/stops/${stopId}/images/${imageId}`),reorder:orderedIds=>api.patch('/stops/reorder',{orderedIds})};
